speaker: speaker1
text: What kind of personality do you think you have ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm quite active and energetic . I approach things enthusiastically and I don't like to leave things half-done .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you think you are introverted or extroverted ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm quite outgoing i think . I enjoy mixing and doing things with others .

speaker: speaker1
text: What do you think is the most important thing for you to be happy ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I maintain that the most important thing is having good friends . A person can't live all by himself I think . A friend in need is a friend in deed.The more really close friends I have , the better .

speaker: speaker1
text: What kind of people do you like to work with ?

speaker: speaker2
text: People who are honest , dedicated to their work and having integrity .
